description: A site manager needs to allocate an available excavator to the foundation excavation task for the next five days.

nodes.task_description: Check the equipment schedule for the availability of an excavator.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that 'Excavator #2' is available for the required period.

nodes.task_description: Assign 'Excavator #2' to the 'Foundation Excavation' task in the project plan.

expected_outcome.value: The resource allocation in the project plan is updated successfully.
